title: Does the monday API block emails from batch?
excerpt:
Hello, 
I use your API to generate a pulse when I move an email to a specific Outlook folder via a webhook. Everything works well but I would like to be able to send an email from my application to an update of this puls…

posts.author: Anthony77 (Dekens)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,
I use your API to generate a pulse when I move an email to a specific Outlook folder via a webhook. Everything works well but I would like to be able to send an email from my application to an update of this pulse in batch. And there the email does not arrive while if I send a mailbox, it works. Does the monday API block emails from batch?
I’m sorry for my english

posts.author: lauralev (Laura Levy)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @Anthony77! Can you explain a bit more about the batch action you’re trying to accomplish? Are you using the API to add batch updates to multiple pulses from an email? I’d love to understand further! Cheers!
